negative_base: low quality, blurry, watermark, visible logo, malformed hands, distorted face, duplicate people, oversaturated colors, fantasy art, illustration, cartoon, anime, vector art, rendered UI, text artifacts

warm_archive.prompt_modifier: Warm archive documentary look, amber practical light, brown and charcoal shadows, subtle film grain, old-library and serious editorial mood, realistic lens compression, understated contrast.
warm_archive.color_notes: Amber, muted brown, ivory highlights, dark charcoal shadow.

cool_institutional.prompt_modifier: Cool institutional documentary look, blue-gray office light, glass meeting rooms, research workplace atmosphere, restrained contrast, realistic modern corporate texture, not futuristic.
cool_institutional.color_notes: Blue-gray, soft white, deep navy, muted steel.

high_contrast_warning.prompt_modifier: High-contrast warning documentary look, dark environment, red or amber accent light, dramatic negative space, tension without horror, editorial realism, no neon cyberpunk.
high_contrast_warning.color_notes: Black, dark red, amber, pale highlights.

switching_rule.behavior: Apply matching prompt_modifier before image generation. Remotion tint still applies on top, but generated image content should already match the selected style.
switching_rule.fallback: If no style is specified, use warm_archive for hook/close, cool_institutional for workplace cases, high_contrast_warning for chapter impact scenes.
